description_long: This house features a modern, boxy two-story design with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The structure is elevated on a rectangular platform, with a prominent staircase leading up to the main entrance on the second level. The exterior is finished in a smooth, light-colored material, likely concrete or stucco, with minimal decorative elements. The lower level is partially enclosed, providing support for the upper story, while the upper level extends outward with a wide overhanging roof. Windows and doors are not prominently visible, suggesting a minimalist or privacy-focused design. The house sits on a flat, tan base that could represent a yard or patio area.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, overhanging upper level, and a staircase leading to the main entrance. The exterior is smooth and light-colored, with a minimalist, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the staircase leading up to the main entrance and the overhanging upper level.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the solid back wall and the wide, flat roof overhang.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the stacked, boxy structure and the platform base.
description_view_3: Side view with the staircase and railing visible, emphasizing the entry access to the upper level.
attribute_entryway_design: Staircase leading to a raised entry platform, minimal overhang, no visible porch or decorative elements
